value.found_quote:
### Automatic detection

When you mention @Claude in a Slack channel or thread, Claude automatically analyzes your message to determine if it's a coding task. If Claude detects coding intent, it will route your request to Claude Code on the web instead of responding as a regular chat assistant.
value.rationale: The page describes "Automatic detection" as a feature of Claude Code in Slack under the "How it works" section, where Claude automatically analyzes messages to detect coding intent. It is presented as a current, available capability.
